issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. The effect requires: (1) looking at 7 cards from top of deck, (2) revealing up to 1 [Lulucia Kingdom] card, (3) adding it to hand, (4) placing the REST at the bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL only searches for and adds a card, missing the 'look at 7' constraint, the 'up to 1' limit specification, and the 'place rest at bottom in any order' step.
Missing condition or filter to restrict the search to only the top 7 cards of the deck (not the entire deck).
Missing action to handle the remaining 6 cards (place them at bottom of deck in any order). This is a material part of the card effect.
